title: Somaliland's high-risk quest for recognition
subhead: The self-proclaimed republic aspires to accede to the international stage. It finds itself at the center of a game of alliances, caught between Israeli, American and Emirati ambitions and threats from Yemen and neighboring Somalia.

subhead: The streaming services filed appeals to contest a new rule that requires them to dedicate 20% of their mandatory investment in French audiovisual content to animation, documentaries and live performance programming.

title: Russia launches deadly barrage on Kyiv region on eve of NATO summit
subhead: Monday's assault was the second on the capital in less than a week. At least 10 people were killed and dozens wounded.

title: You can get good Latin American food in Paris. Here's where
subhead: From colorful market stalls to a welcoming restaurant dining room, here is our selection of places to discover Colombian, Argentinian or Brazilian dishes in Paris.

title: Politicial scientist Alexandra de Hoop Scheffer: 'Washington is pursuing a strategy of strategic saturation'
subhead: According to the president of the German Marshall Fund, the US, who is engaged on multiple fronts, is renegotiating the transatlantic contract unilaterally by pressuring its European allies to take responsibility for their own security. This 'burden shifting' challenges Europe to coordinate the organization of its defense industries.

Vladimir Putin, or the loneliness of 'Homo Sovieticus'
subhead: Between denial of reality, a desire for revenge and carefully crafted messaging, the Russian president has tried to position himself as the master of the game. But after more than four years of war in Ukraine, these old tricks inherited from the Soviet past are showing their limitations, and he is losing credibility.

title: 250 years of American independence: How the text that founded the US – and changed the world – was drafted
subhead: 'America 250' (1/13). The 13 colonies had been fighting the British Crown for a year when, in July 1776, lawyer Thomas Jefferson completed the drafting of the Declaration of Independence. Adopted by Congress on July 4 in Philadelphia, this document, which established the principle of equality for all – even though slavery was still legal everywhere – founded the United States of America.

title: 'We sacrificed everything': In Nablus, the relentless decline of Palestinian society
subhead: In the occupied West Bank, Israel's financial stranglehold on the Palestinian Authority, combined with the proliferation of military checkpoints, has pushed society into unprecedented poverty. In Nablus, the economic heart of the occupied territory, all sectors have faced a sharp decline in living standards.
byline: Lucien Lung and  Marie Jo Sader
